title: Emissions
description: Outbound system->caller capabilities a concept can emit, publish, notify, or deliver.

name.description: Emission name, usually event-like (e.g. job.completed, quota.warning).

trigger.description: Condition that causes the system to emit this.

payload.description: Canonical payload schema or prose shape.

recipient.description: Who can receive or subscribe to this emission.

delivery.description: Delivery expectation (e.g. best-effort, at-least-once, feed availability, notification).

retry.description: Retry behavior, or null when not applicable.

ordering.description: Ordering guarantee, or null when not applicable.

deduplication.description: Deduplication key or strategy, or null when not applicable.

requires_capability.description: Capability a receiver/subscriber must hold. Null or absent when no special capability is required.

description.description: Optional prose description when the contract fields are insufficient.
